content: Setup: copy repo KN10, install deps, run load_context, read Tier-0 + handoff
Baseline: seed_reset (119/0/0), verify app loads + login works
P0-A: Fix number generators → max-based (deletion-safe). POC 12/12, gates 119/0/0
P1-C: Frontend Multi-Level Approval — chain stepper, role-aware buttons, level progress (verified UI + API E2E flow). Added multi-level demo POs to seed
P0-B: Resolve AP dualism (owner decision needed) — report before this
